mapper.select: SELECT partner_id, partner_role, active FROM tb_trade_partner WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND partner_id = #{partnerId} LIMIT 1
SELECT part_id, part_code FROM tb_pc_part WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND part_id = #{partId} AND active = TRUE LIMIT 1

SELECT d.document_id, d.document_no, d.document_type, d.document_status, d.partner_id, COALESCE(tp.partner_name, '-') AS partner_name, COALESCE( SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(p.part_name ORDER BY m.movement_id SEPARATOR ','), ',', 1), '-' ) AS first_part_name, COUNT(DISTINCT m.movement_id) AS line_count, COALESCE(SUM(m.quantity), 0) AS total_quantity, COALESCE(pm.name, '-') AS processed_by_name, d.created_at FROM tb_stock_document d LEFT JOIN tb_trade_partner tp ON tp.company_id = d.company_id AND tp.partner_id = d.partner_id LEFT JOIN tb_stock_movement m ON m.company_id = d.company_id AND m.document_id = d.document_id LEFT JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = m.company_id AND p.part_id = m.part_id LEFT JOIN tb_member pm ON pm.company_id = d.company_id AND pm.member_id = d.processed_by
GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_no, d.document_type, d.document_status, d.partner_id, tp.partner_name, pm.name, d.created_at ORDER BY d.document_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) FROM tb_stock_document d LEFT JOIN tb_trade_partner tp ON tp.company_id = d.company_id AND tp.partner_id = d.partner_id LEFT JOIN tb_stock_movement m ON m.company_id = d.company_id AND m.document_id = d.document_id LEFT JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = m.company_id AND p.part_id = m.part_id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT filtered.document_id) AS total_count, COALESCE(SUM(filtered.total_quantity), 0) AS total_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(filtered.waiting_quantity), 0) AS waiting_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN filtered.document_status = 'CANCELED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS canceled_count FROM ( SELECT d.document_id, d.document_status, COALESCE(SUM(m.quantity), 0) AS total_quantity, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_stock_movement mw JOIN tb_stock_movement_unit mu ON mu.movement_id = mw.movement_id JOIN tb_pc_part_unit u ON u.company_id = mw.company_id AND u.unit_id = mu.unit_id WHERE mw.company_id = d.company_id AND mw.document_id = d.document_id AND u.inspection_status = 'WAITING' AND u.unit_status = 'IN_STOCK' AND u.active = TRUE ), 0) AS waiting_quantity FROM tb_stock_document d LEFT JOIN tb_trade_partner tp ON tp.company_id = d.company_id AND tp.partner_id = d.partner_id LEFT JOIN tb_stock_movement m ON m.company_id = d.company_id AND m.document_id = d.document_id LEFT JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = m.company_id AND p.part_id = m.part_id
GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_status ) filtered

SELECT u.unit_id, u.internal_serial_no, u.manufacturer_serial_no, p.part_id, p.category_id, c.category_name, p.part_name, p.model_name, p.manufacturer, p.part_code, u.unit_status, u.inspection_status, u.grade, u.sales_status FROM tb_pc_part_unit u JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = u.company_id AND p.part_id = u.part_id JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id
ORDER BY u.updated_at DESC, u.unit_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_pc_part_unit u JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = u.company_id AND p.part_id = u.part_id JOIN tb_part_category c ON c.company_id = p.company_id AND c.category_id = p.category_id
mapper.sql: SELECT d.document_id, d.document_no, d.document_type, d.document_status, d.partner_id, COALESCE(tp.partner_name, '-') AS partner_name, d.reason, COALESCE(pm.name, '-') AS processed_by_name, d.created_at, COUNT(DISTINCT m.movement_id) AS line_count, COALESCE(SUM(m.quantity), 0) AS total_quantity FROM tb_stock_document d LEFT JOIN tb_trade_partner tp ON tp.company_id = d.company_id AND tp.partner_id = d.partner_id LEFT JOIN tb_member pm ON pm.company_id = d.company_id AND pm.member_id = d.processed_by LEFT JOIN tb_stock_movement m ON m.company_id = d.company_id AND m.document_id = d.document_id AND m.canceled_movement_id IS NULL WHERE d.company_id = #{companyId} AND d.document_id = #{documentId} GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_no, d.document_type, d.document_status, d.partner_id, tp.partner_name, d.reason, pm.name, d.created_at
mapper.select: SELECT d.document_id, d.document_no, d.document_type, d.document_status, d.partner_id, COALESCE(tp.partner_name, '-') AS partner_name, d.reason, COALESCE(pm.name, '-') AS processed_by_name, d.created_at, 0 AS line_count, 0 AS total_quantity FROM tb_stock_document d LEFT JOIN tb_trade_partner tp ON tp.company_id = d.company_id AND tp.partner_id = d.partner_id LEFT JOIN tb_member pm ON pm.company_id = d.company_id AND pm.member_id = d.processed_by WHERE d.company_id = #{companyId} AND d.document_id = #{documentId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT m.movement_id, m.part_id, p.part_name, p.model_name, p.part_code, m.movement_type, m.movement_status, m.quantity, m.before_quantity, m.after_quantity, m.reason FROM tb_stock_movement m JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = m.company_id AND p.part_id = m.part_id WHERE m.company_id = #{companyId} AND m.document_id = #{documentId} AND m.canceled_movement_id IS NULL ORDER BY m.movement_id

SELECT m.movement_id, m.part_id, p.part_name, p.model_name, p.part_code, m.movement_type, m.movement_status, m.quantity, m.before_quantity, m.after_quantity, m.reason FROM tb_stock_movement m JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = m.company_id AND p.part_id = m.part_id WHERE m.company_id = #{companyId} AND m.document_id = #{documentId} AND m.movement_type = 'INBOUND' AND m.canceled_movement_id IS NULL ORDER BY m.movement_id FOR UPDATE

SELECT m.movement_id, m.part_id, p.part_name, p.model_name, p.part_code, m.movement_type, m.movement_status, m.quantity, m.before_quantity, m.after_quantity, m.reason FROM tb_stock_movement m JOIN tb_pc_part p ON p.company_id = m.company_id AND p.part_id = m.part_id WHERE m.company_id = #{companyId} AND m.document_id = #{documentId} AND m.movement_type = 'OUTBOUND' AND m.canceled_movement_id IS NULL ORDER BY m.movement_id FOR UPDATE

SELECT m.movement_id, u.unit_id, u.internal_serial_no, u.manufacturer_serial_no, u.unit_status, u.grade, u.inspection_status, u.sales_status, u.active FROM tb_stock_movement m JOIN tb_stock_movement_unit mu ON mu.movement_id = m.movement_id JOIN tb_pc_part_unit u ON u.company_id = m.company_id AND u.unit_id = mu.unit_id WHERE m.company_id = #{companyId} AND m.document_id = #{documentId} AND m.canceled_movement_id IS NULL ORDER BY m.movement_id, u.unit_id
SELECT unit_id FROM tb_stock_movement_unit WHERE movement_id = #{movementId} ORDER BY unit_id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_stock_movement m JOIN tb_stock_movement_unit mu ON mu.movement_id = m.movement_id JOIN tb_pc_part_unit u ON u.company_id = m.company_id AND u.unit_id = mu.unit_id WHERE m.company_id = #{companyId} AND m.document_id = #{documentId} AND m.movement_type = 'INBOUND' AND m.canceled_movement_id IS NULL AND ( m.movement_status != 'COMPLETED' OR u.active != TRUE OR u.unit_status != 'IN_STOCK' OR u.inspection_status != 'WAITING' OR u.sales_status != 'HOLD' )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_stock_movement m JOIN tb_stock_movement_unit mu ON mu.movement_id = m.movement_id JOIN tb_pc_part_unit u ON u.company_id = m.company_id AND u.unit_id = mu.unit_id WHERE m.company_id = #{companyId} AND m.document_id = #{documentId} AND m.movement_type = 'OUTBOUND' AND m.canceled_movement_id IS NULL AND ( m.movement_status != 'COMPLETED' OR u.active != TRUE OR u.unit_status != 'OUTBOUND' )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_stock_document ( company_id, partner_id, document_no, document_type, document_status, reason, processed_by ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{partnerId}, #{documentNo}, #{documentType}, #{documentStatus}, #{reason}, #{processedBy} )

INSERT INTO tb_stock_movement ( company_id, document_id, part_id, movement_type, movement_status, canceled_movement_id, quantity, before_quantity, after_quantity, reason, processed_by ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{documentId}, #{partId}, #{movementType}, #{movementStatus}, #{canceledMovementId}, #{quantity}, #{beforeQuantity}, #{afterQuantity}, #{reason}, #{processedBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(internal_serial_no, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM tb_pc_part_unit WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND internal_serial_no LIKE CONCAT(#{serialPrefix}, '-', #{dateToken}, '-%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pc_part_unit ( company_id, part_id, internal_serial_no, manufacturer_serial_no, unit_status, grade, inspection_status, sales_status, active, created_by ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{partId}, #{internalSerialNo}, #{manufacturerSerialNo}, #{unitStatus}, #{grade}, #{inspectionStatus}, #{salesStatus}, #{active}, #{createdBy} )
INSERT INTO tb_stock_movement_unit ( movement_id, unit_id, before_unit_status, after_unit_status ) VALUES ( #{movementId}, #{unitId}, NULL, #{afterUnitStatus} )
INSERT INTO tb_stock_movement_unit ( movement_id, unit_id, before_unit_status, after_unit_status ) VALUES ( #{movementId}, #{unitId}, #{beforeUnitStatus}, #{afterUnitStatus} )
